title: Apple Founded
description: Steve Jobs, Steve Wozniak, and Ronald Wayne found Apple Computer in the Jobs family garage in Los Altos, California.

title: Macintosh Launch
description: The Macintosh is introduced with the famous '1984' Super Bowl commercial, bringing the graphical user interface to the masses.

title: Departure from Apple
description: Following a power struggle with CEO John Sculley, Jobs is stripped of his duties and resigns from Apple.

title: NeXT & Pixar
description: Jobs founds NeXT Computer and acquires the Graphics Group from Lucasfilm, which later becomes Pixar Animation Studios.

title: Return to Apple
description: Apple acquires NeXT, and Jobs returns to the company he co-founded, eventually becoming 'iCEO'.

title: iPod & iTunes
description: Apple introduces the iPod, revolutionizing the music industry and beginning the company's transformation into a digital powerhouse.

title: iPhone Launch
description: Jobs unveils the iPhone, describing it as 'a revolutionary mobile phone, a widescreen iPod with touch controls, and a breakthrough Internet communications device.'

title: Legacy
description: Steve Jobs passes away, leaving behind a legacy that transformed the way we live, work, and communicate.
